case_title: JOEL N. ALONSO VS. ABRAM AND SONS TOWING, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,490.22 FILED BY ALONSO, JOEL N. AS TO DEFENDANT ABRAM AND SONS TOWING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ABRAM AND SONS TOWING, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-15-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY GENEVIEVE ROMERO--OFFICE MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2015 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-15-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ALONSO, JOEL N.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ABRAM AND SONS TOWING, INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-15-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (M.J.BUSHE OWNER OF ABRAM & SONS TOWING, INC.) FILED BY DEFENDANT ABRAM AND SONS TOWING, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALONSO, JOEL N. AS TO DEFENDANT ABRAM AND SONS TOWING, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-20-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ABRAM AND SONS TOWING, INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALONSO, JOEL N. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABRAM AND SONS TOWING, INC. $4,490.22 PRINCIPAL, $557.00 INTEREST, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,112.22, PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $2,536.11 ON DECEMBER 29, 2015 AND $2,536.11 ON JANUARY 29, 2016. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $2536.11 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON DEC-29-2015 AND ON THE 29TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
